_meta.description: Example Stage 0 output — intent extraction from a real customer brief

input_brief:
We are looking for various happy Travel Clips & Stills reflecting the following views:

Band Tours (from the POV of the Band)
Concert/Festival goers
Road Trips
Family Vacations

Some airport shots w suitcases
in cars, campers, minivans
on tour buses
trains

Showing cheerful comfy stays indoors in hotels/motels
in the rooms (watching tv, working, relaxing, chatting etc)
working in lobbies/public areas, also in rooms
Breakfast/Lunch/Dinner at the hotel/motel
poolside and pool activities
Gym

some exciting outdoor travel activity clips as well:
beach (sunning, sailing, paragliding. water skiing)
forests/country side
cities (walks scooter rides, bike rides)

We are looking for bright and sunny shots. Mainly UGC/social influencer POVs first person POVs but also the person they are traveling with.

brief_diagnostics.reasoning_summary: The brief enumerates a wide range of distinct travel-related subjects and activities with overlapping scene types and specific visual signals including UGC, first-person perspectives, and bright, cheerful moods. Each activity and setting is visually unique, requiring clear decomposition into multiple search lanes to ensure full thematic and stylistic coverage.

search_lanes.lane_goal: Retrieve behind-the-scenes images or clips from the perspective of the band during tours.
search_lanes.embedding_query: First-person POV inside a tour bus or backstage, showing band members relaxing or preparing for a performance, shot in bright and sunny natural light.
ranking_hints: prefer images with casual, candid energy

search_lanes.lane_goal: Retrieve shots of happy attendees at concerts or music festivals.
search_lanes.embedding_query: First-person style UGC photo of cheerful people at a music festival, smiling or waving in a bright outdoor setting.

search_lanes.lane_goal: Find POV shots of people on the road in cars, campers, or minivans.
search_lanes.embedding_query: First-person UGC video from inside a car or camper showing friends or family laughing and looking out the window while traveling on a sunny day.

search_lanes.lane_goal: Collect cheerful shots of families spending time together during travel.
search_lanes.embedding_query: UGC photo of a family smiling together at a scenic location with luggage and travel gear, shot in sunny weather.

search_lanes.lane_goal: Source images or clips of people with suitcases at airports.
search_lanes.embedding_query: POV shot of a person walking with a suitcase through a sunlit airport terminal, showing anticipation and excitement.
ranking_hints: prefer motion blur or dynamic feel

search_lanes.lane_goal: Collect imagery of people traveling on a tour bus from the inside.
search_lanes.embedding_query: UGC first-person photo inside a tour bus with people chatting and relaxing on a bright day.

search_lanes.lane_goal: Find POV or candid shots of people traveling by train.
search_lanes.embedding_query: UGC-style first-person image of someone looking out a train window at passing scenery on a sunny day.

search_lanes.lane_goal: Retrieve images of cheerful, comfortable people relaxing or working inside hotel or motel rooms.
search_lanes.embedding_query: POV UGC shot of a person lounging, watching TV, or working on a laptop in a cozy, sunlit hotel room.

search_lanes.lane_goal: Find images of people working or socializing in hotel or motel lobbies and public spaces.
search_lanes.embedding_query: First-person or candid UGC photo of someone working or meeting in a stylish hotel lobby with bright daylight.

search_lanes.lane_goal: Source breakfast, lunch, or dinner scenes in hotel or motel dining spaces.
search_lanes.embedding_query: UGC photo of smiling people enjoying a meal together at a hotel dining area in natural sunlight.
ranking_hints: prefer visible food and happy faces

search_lanes.lane_goal: Retrieve UGC/influencer style shots of people relaxing or having fun at hotel or motel pools.
search_lanes.embedding_query: First-person UGC photo of people swimming, lounging, or playing by a bright, sunny outdoor pool at a hotel.

search_lanes.lane_goal: Source images of people working out in hotel or motel gyms.
search_lanes.embedding_query: UGC style photo of a traveler exercising in a sunlit hotel gym, focusing on motivation and wellness.

search_lanes.lane_goal: Find imagery of people sunning themselves on the beach.
search_lanes.embedding_query: UGC style first-person photo of a person or friends sunbathing on a sunny beach with towels and blue sky.

search_lanes.lane_goal: Source UGC style imagery of people sailing near the beach.
search_lanes.embedding_query: First-person UGC video of people sailing in turquoise waters near a sunny beach, laughter and joy in the scene.

search_lanes.lane_goal: Find dynamic UGC/influencer first-person views of paragliding at the beach.
search_lanes.embedding_query: POV action shot from a person paragliding over a sunny beach with sand and sea below.

search_lanes.lane_goal: Curate first-person or nearby UGC shots of people water skiing along beaches.
search_lanes.embedding_query: UGC first-person video of someone water skiing near a sandy, sunlit beach with splashing water.
ranking_hints: prefer views of both skier and beach

search_lanes.lane_goal: Gather first-person or candid shots of travel in forests or countryside landscapes.
search_lanes.embedding_query: UGC photo of someone walking or biking on a sunlit path through green countryside or forest.

search_lanes.lane_goal: Collect first-person or candid photos of urban exploration by foot.
search_lanes.embedding_query: UGC first-person photo of a person strolling on a city sidewalk in bright sunlight, surrounded by tall buildings.

search_lanes.lane_goal: Retrieve first-person UGC style images or clips from riding a scooter in the city.
search_lanes.embedding_query: First-person UGC video from a city street showing a person riding a scooter past urban architecture on a sunny day.

search_lanes.lane_goal: Find UGC style first-person images or clips from bike riding through a city.
search_lanes.embedding_query: First-person UGC video of cycling through city streets with sunlit buildings and people passing by.
